tools.description: Send an email to a recipient

tools.description: Send a message to a Slack channel or user

parameters.description: Slack channel name or user handle

tools.name: get_account_balance

tools.name: translate_text
tools.description: Translate text from one language to another

parameters.description: Target language code (e.g., fr, es, de)

parameters.name: attendees

tools.name: get_stock_price
tools.description: Get the current stock price for a ticker symbol

tools.name: set_reminder
tools.description: Set a reminder for the user

parameters.name: datetime
parameters.description: When to remind in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM format

tools.name: generate_summary
tools.description: Generate a summary of given text or document

tools.name: delete_data
tools.description: Permanently delete user data - DANGEROUS operation
